analysis.consistency: High. The item's name, type, and mechanical effects are internally consistent.
analysis.quality: High. The description clearly outlines the activation, duration/deactivation condition, weight limit, and interaction method (DC 30 Strength check). The core concept is well-established.

mechanics.primary_effect: Magically fixed in place, defying gravity.
limitations: Weight limit: 8,000 pounds (exceeding this deactivates the rod).
mechanics.interaction: Creature can use an action to make a DC 30 Strength check to move the fixed rod up to 10 feet.
mechanics.clarifications_needed: None immediately apparent; mechanics are straightforward for a common magic item effect.

analysis.source_data_match: The provided raw data matches the expected structure for an item record.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The Immovable Rod is a straightforward utility item. The mechanics are robust, especially the inclusion of the DC 30 Strength check to forcefully move the item while it is fixed, which prevents total immobility against powerful creatures. Rarity (Uncommon) seems appropriate for this level of utility and limited holding capacity.
